title: crotalaria strigosa
intro: Crotalaria strigosa, also known as hairy rattlebox, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria strigosa include its ability to treat various ailments, such as fever, cough, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by drying and powdering the leaves, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or topical applications.
